meta.purpose: Single source for site copy and design tokens. assets/js/theme-loader.js fetches this file on load.
meta.localServerNote: Serve the repository root over HTTP (e.g. python3 -m http.server) so data/theme.json loads; opening index.html as file:// may block fetch.

site.title: Sachin Prajapati · D2C Growth Strategist & Full-Funnel Lead

brand.roleShort: Growth Head · Full-funnel performance, analytics & multi-channel scale
brand.heroDesc: I design and run full-funnel growth systems—Meta, Google, SEO, CRO, analytics, and retention—so CAC drops, LTV rises, and revenue compounds. Predictable pipelines, not one-off campaign spikes.

featuredCase.brandTag: Apparel D2C — My Pixel Panda Portfolio
featuredCase.title: ₹40L → ₹1.31 Crore in 3 months — same brand, full-funnel scale
featuredCase.description: A clothing brand scaling from ₹47.48L/month to ₹1.31Cr/month using the P1P2P3–H1H2H3 framework, geo-led acquisition strategy, cross-channel signal architecture, and a systematic creative expansion plan.

dashboardProof.dataSpreadsheetHint: Interactive funnel model · opens in new tab

blocks.label: The Situation
blocks.body: Strong July baseline (₹47.48L, 2,648 orders) but the brand needed a disciplined system to scale—geo-led acquisition, clean cross-channel signals, and a creative expansion plan without losing efficiency.

blocks.label: What We Ran
blocks.body: P1P2P3–H1H2H3 plus HERO–HUB–HYGIENE: Meta scaled to ₹12.07L spend at 5.3× ROAS in August (₹64L of ₹80L revenue); layered Google, influencers, and WhatsApp. Budget grew to ₹28.21L/month by October—peak ₹1.31Cr revenue and 7,507 orders.

timeline.html: Execution sprint. 8–10 UGC + statics + carousels; 10–15 influencers; Google Shopping + WhatsApp flows live. Meta scaled to ₹12.07L at 5.3× ROAS.
Double budget + tests. Meta + Google scaled together; new hooks and UGC 2.0. Revenue crossed ₹1Cr; 6,428 orders; CPA ₹398 during aggressive scale (expected).
Peak scale. CPA improved ₹398 → ₹376; ROAS 4.66× at peak budget. 7,507 orders; ₹1.31Cr revenue—target exceeded.

quote.text: Marketing is not turning on ads. It is building systems that produce profitable, scalable growth.
quote.attribution: — Sachin Prajapati · Growth Head, My Pixel Panda

cards.title: ₹1L on Day 1 — 13× Meta ROAS, 17× Google ROAS from zero
cards.description: New accessories brand. No audience, no history. Built cross-channel signal architecture (Meta + Google) from scratch. Now at ₹30L+/month, projecting ₹1Cr/month.

cards.title: 3,000+ leads/month with 47% CPL reduction via Performance Max
cards.description: EdTech brand with high CPL and high bounce rate. Data-driven targeting + PMax restructure cut cost per lead by nearly half while scaling volume consistently.

cards.title: ₹2L → ₹10L/month with 39% CAC reduction
cards.description: Clothing brand with zero paid marketing history. Built acquisition engine from scratch — Meta + funnel + creative strategy. 5× revenue, lower CAC.

cards.title: 42,784 retargeting sessions and 3.2× ROI from near-zero conversions
cards.description: Home décor brand with 0.5% conversion rate. Dynamic ads + deep retargeting funnels rebuilt the system. Tens of thousands of sessions generated via retargeting.

cards.title: ₹1.2M quarterly sales + 30 international B2B connections from zero
cards.description: AI mental wellness startup. Full GTM strategy built from scratch — brand, acquisition, and international B2B development. Delivered 3.79× ROAS alongside global reach.

cards.title: 90% organic traffic growth and first-page rankings for 15+ keywords in 6 months
cards.description: Service brand with zero organic presence. Technical SEO overhaul. ₹43L in final quarter alone. ₹1.8Cr total revenue delivered.

kicker.before: Two operating systems I use to align

cards.title: P1P2P3 – H1H2H3 Scaling Framework
cards.description: Full-funnel media architecture for D2C scale: P1 cold acquisition → P2 warm engagement → P3 conversion and LTV. Each stage pairs with creative hooks—H1 problem-aware, H2 solution-aware, H3 brand-aware. Live across 30+ accounts; core to the ₹40L → ₹1.31 Cr sprint.

cards.title: HERO – HUB – HYGIENE Creative Ecosystem
cards.description: A repeatable creative operating model: HERO for reach and recall, HUB for depth on warm audiences, HYGIENE for retention and reorders. Tripled recall on the flagship apparel brand; now the default across the My Pixel Panda portfolio.

cards.title: Full-funnel ownership
cards.description: From awareness to conversion to LTV—I own the revenue path, not a single channel tab.

cards.title: Multi-channel orchestration
cards.description: Meta, Google, SEO, email, WhatsApp, retargeting, and automation orchestrated as one system—not competing silos.

cards.title: Measurement you can trust
cards.description: GA4, GTM, CAPI, server-side events, and sane attribution—so decisions follow reality, not dashboard fiction.

cards.title: Creative that sells
cards.description: Hooks, angles, UGC direction, and testing cadence—creative engineered for conversion, not vanity.

cards.title: Decisions from the data layer
cards.description: Journeys, CAC maps, cohorts, and revenue models—scale calls backed by evidence, not noise.

cards.title: Leadership & systems
cards.description: Led a seven-person pod. SOPs, KPIs, and reporting so growth survives beyond any single operator.

steps.title: Strategy — find the real leak
steps.description: Deep funnel audit across GA4, GTM, CAPI, and attribution. Most teams optimize the wrong layer—I locate where revenue bleeds before spend moves.

steps.title: Systems — build the architecture
steps.description: P1P2P3 structure, rebuilt tracking, and cross-channel design—so the full-funnel engine exists before budgets scale.

steps.title: Creativity — HERO · HUB · HYGIENE
steps.description: Structured testing, UGC direction, and hook/angle iteration—winners scale fast, losers get cut; the data picks, not the ego.

steps.title: Scale — retention & LTV compounding
steps.description: Email, WhatsApp, subs, and reorder flows timed to your purchase cycle—when LTV compounds, efficient CAC gets easier, not harder.

ctaSection.subtitle: I partner with D2C teams that have solid products and honest data. If performance has plateaued, we can audit the full funnel together: clear numbers, prioritized fixes, no slide-deck theatre.
